recommended_servers.name: context7
recommended_servers.description: Up-to-date code docs for any prompt — fetches version-specific documentation and examples from official sources
recommended_servers.relevance: Useful when working with bats-core, jq, and other shell tooling used throughout the project. Keeps docs current without relying on training data cutoffs.

recommended_servers.name: github
recommended_servers.description: Access the GitHub API — file operations, repository management, issue/PR management, search
recommended_servers.relevance: ultrainit is distributed via GitHub Releases and uses GitHub Actions for CI/CD. This server enables managing releases, PRs, issues, and the GHCR container registry directly from Claude.

recommended_servers.name: docker
recommended_servers.description: Structured Docker operations (ps, images, logs, build, compose) as typed JSON
recommended_servers.relevance: ultrainit uses Docker (Dockerfile.test) to run the bats-core test suite in isolation. This server lets Claude manage the test image builds, inspect running containers, and tail test logs.

recommended_servers.name: shell-exec
recommended_servers.description: Execute bash commands with background job support
recommended_servers.relevance: The entire ultrainit project is bash — running the test suite (make test-all), validating scripts (scripts/validate-skill.sh), and exercising the CLI directly all require shell execution. Useful for quick iteration without leaving the editor.
